data.title: Alithya Group inc. wins the 2025-2026 Microsoft AI Business Solutions Inner Circle award for outstanding sales and innovation.
data.description: Alithya Group inc, a company listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol ALYA, received recognition from Microsoft for its exceptional sales performance and innovation. The announcement was made in Montreal on September 24, 2025. Alithya has been chosen to be part of the prestigious AI Business Solutions 2025-2026 Microsoft Inner Circle, a select group of top-performing partners. This acknowledgment highlights Alithya's commitment to excellence in the field.

data.title: Insight Molecular Diagnostics will present GraftAssure™ technology at conferences in Singapore & Orlando.
data.description: Today, in Nashville, Tennessee, Insight Molecular Diagnostics Inc. (Nasdaq: IMDX) disclosed its presence at two significant industry conferences. The company, also known as iMDx, will highlight its innovative GraftAssure™ technology during the events. Of note is the discussion on its clinical kitted test currently in the development phase.

data.title: Ming Shing Group Holdings Limited appoints new Board member to help achieve mission of leading wet trades works provider.
data.description: On September 24, 2025, Ming Shing Group Holdings Limited, a company based in Hong Kong and listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol MSW, specializing in wet trades works, revealed a noteworthy development within its Board of Directors. The company's goal is to emerge as the foremost wet trades works service provider in Hong Kong.

data.title: uniQure's AMT-130 shows 75% disease slowing in Huntington's patients after 36 months, meeting primary endpoint.
data.description: A recent important study revealed that the high-dose AMT-130 met its primary goal, showcasing a remarkable 75% slowdown in disease progression over 36 months. This significant result was determined through a comparison to a similar external control group using the cUHDRS measure. This outcome marks a pivotal moment in addressing this particular disease.
Nykredit Realkredit A/S has set the coupon rates for its bonds.

data.title: Cryptocurrency challenges traditional banks with America's new GENIUS Act allowing dApps to hold stablecoins. Increased competition from DeFi could disrupt traditional banking systems. Learn more on Benzinga.com.
data.description: The article discusses the complexity of modern banking systems and how blockchain technology, specifically through America's new GENIUS Act, is challenging traditional banking models. With the act allowing decentralized applications (dApps) to hold stablecoins on behalf of users, customers can now directly park their cash on-chain and use it within a growing range of services. This shift poses a threat to traditional high-street lenders weighed down by outdated systems and high fees. Decentralized finance (DeFi) simplifies banking by offering tailored services such as safekeeping money, transfers, and programmability without unnecessary bundled services. This change, once considered fringe, is now supported by lawmakers, providing legal standing for stablecoins and revolutionizing the banking sector.Total characters: 781

data.title: Bitcoin price holds steady near $113K despite mixed signals from RSI and Fed rate cut impact. Technical indicators point to consolidation.
data.description: The current trading price of Bitcoin is $112,994, showing conflicting signals in the market. The Federal Reserve's recent rate cut has positively impacted sentiment among investors. However, technical indicators are pointing towards a potential consolidation phase in the near future.

data.title: Morchem marks 40 years with debut of new solventless laminating adhesives at PACK EXPO in Las Vegas next week.
data.description: Located in Pleasant Prairie, Wisconsin, MORCHEM, a leading global manufacturer of laminating adhesives for eco-friendly flexible packaging, is marking its 40th anniversary in September 2025. The company is set to unveil its latest solventless adhesives at PACK EXPO, scheduled to take place in Las Vegas next week. This major milestone celebration comes as the company aims to continue its innovation in the sustainable packaging sector and expand its offerings to customers.

data.title: Exchange Income Corporation celebrates 4th season of Atik Mason Indigenous Pilot Pathway, providing employment to program members, including first Nunavut graduate.
data.description: Exchange Income Corporation in Winnipeg, Manitoba is marking the success of the Atik Mason Indigenous Pilot Pathway for the fourth consecutive season. This program has provided valuable employment opportunities to its participants.

data.title: PayPal partners with Blue Owl Capital for $7 billion in "Pay in 4" loans over 2 years for U.S. Buy Now, Pay Later.
data.description: A leading alternative asset management firm, Blue Owl Capital, has announced plans to acquire around $7 billion worth of "Pay in 4" loans from PayPal in the U.S. within the next two years. This deal signals a significant partnership between PayPal Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: PYPL) and Blue Owl Capital (NYSE: OWL), with the aim of bolstering their financial portfolios. The transaction, announced in San Jose, California on September 24, 2025, showcases the ability of institutional investors like Blue Owl to engage in substantial acquisitions within the fintech sector.

data.title: Northstar introduces fourth product line, recovering limestone from asphalt shingles with new patent.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on September 24, 2025, Northstar Clean Technologies Inc. (TSXV: ROOF) (OTCQB: ROOOF) shared the achievement of successfully isolating and reclaiming limestone from asphalt shingles. This development marks the addition of a fourth product line for the company, expanding its offerings.

data.title: AAED expands with new campus in North Phoenix, offering integrated therapies and small group instruction for autism spectrum students.
data.description: A campus in Phoenix, established on September 24, 2025, offers integrated therapies, small group instruction, and Safety-Care training to aid students on the autism spectrum. The Autism Academy for Education and Development (AAED), Arizona's primary autism-focused K-12+ academy, provides crucial support to students with autism.

data.title: Hyalex Orthopaedics to present at Jefferies Virtual Private MedTech Summit. Carl Vause, president, to discuss joint preservation technologies.
data.description: On September 24, 2025, in Lexington, Massachusetts, Hyalex Orthopaedics, a privately owned medical device firm working on joint preservation innovations utilizing the groundbreaking HYALEX Hydrosurf™ materials platform, revealed that Carl Vause, the company's president and chief executive officer...

data.title: Reshift Media named to Entrepreneur's Top Franchise Marketing Suppliers for third year, recognized for marketing expertise.
data.description: Reshift Media, a top digital marketing firm known for its effectiveness in the franchise industry, was selected as one of the most reputable marketing agencies by franchisors. The renowned company based in New York was honored by Entrepreneur Magazine on September 24, 2025. This recognition highlights Reshift Media's success in providing innovative marketing strategies for franchises and solidifies its position as a leader in the industry.

data.title: ChainUp wins Transaction Monitoring Solution Provider of the Year at ALB Pan-Asian Regulatory Awards 2025 presented by Thomson Reuters.
data.description: In Singapore on September 24, 2025, ChainUp, a prominent provider of B2B digital asset technology solutions, was honored with the title of Transaction Monitoring Solution Provider of the Year at the Asian Legal Business (ALB) Pan-Asian Regulatory Awards 2025. This prestigious award was presented by Thomson Reuters. This recognition is a testament to ChainUp's excellence in the industry, solidifying its position as a top player in the digital asset technology sector across Asia.

data.title: AGF Management reported Q3 adjusted EPS of $0.46 & total AUM of $56.8B. Net retail mutual fund sales were $262M. CEO Goldring highlighted strong performance and growth strategy. AGF's adjusted EBITDA for Q3 was $46.2M, net fees were $88.8M, & adjusted net income was $31.2M. CEO Goldring made key leadership appointments & AGF Intl Advisors signed UK Stewardship Code.
data.description: AGF Management Limited (AGF) reported quarterly adjusted diluted earnings per share of $0.46, with total assets under management and fee-earning assets at $56.8 billion. The firm announced financial results for the third quarter of 2025, showcasing an improvement in sales compared to the industry, with mutual fund gross sales at $1,260 million for the quarter, an increase from the previous quarter. Retail mutual fund net sales were at $262 million, indicating a positive trend. Judy Goldring, the CEO, highlighted the firm's strong performance and strategic focus on diversification across asset classes. AGF named Goldring as CEO following the passing of the previous CEO, Kevin McCreadie. Goldring made key leadership changes, appointing Chris Jackson as President & COO and David Stonehouse as interim CIO. The company's adjusted EBITDA for the quarter was $46.2 million, with adjusted net income at $31.2 million. The financial report also detailed revenues and fee breakdowns, showing growth in management and advisory fees. AGF International Advisors Company Limited was accepted as a signatory to the UK Stewardship Code. These results highlight AGF's positive trajectory under Goldring's leadership and its strategic growth initiatives.

data.title: Canopy Growth extends proxy voting deadline for annual meeting to Sep 26, 2025. Meeting to be held virtually.
data.description: Canopy Growth Corporation has extended the deadline for proxy submissions related to its annual general and special meeting of shareholders to September 26, 2025, at 9:00 AM ET. The Meeting is scheduled for the same day at 1:00 PM ET and will be conducted via live audio webcast at www.virtualshareholdermeeting.com/WEED2025. Canopy Growth is listed on the TSX as WEED and on the NASDAQ as CGC.

data.title: CTO Realty Growth completes $5M share repurchase program, Board approves new $10M authorization for common stock repurchase.
data.description: In Winter Park, Florida on September 24, 2025, CTO Realty Growth, Inc. (NYSE: CTO) revealed a fresh common stock repurchase initiative voted in favor by its Board of Directors worth $10 million. This comes after the completion of their earlier $5 million common stock repurchase plan, during which around $4.3 million of the Company’s common stock was bought back over the last 60 days.

data.title: ENHERTU® + pertuzumab gets Priority Review in US as 1st-line treatment for HER2-positive metastatic breast cancer. FDA granted due to significant potential for improvement.
data.description: In Wilmington, Delaware, AstraZeneca and Daiichi Sankyo's supplemental Biologics License Application (sBLA) for ENHERTU® (fam-trastuzumab deruxtecan-nxki) with pertuzumab has been accepted and given Priority Review in the US for treating 1st-line adult patients with unresectable or metastatic HER2-positive breast cancer. The Food and Drug Administration (FDA) grants Priority Review to applications for medications that could provide notable enhancements in patient care.

data.title: Johnson Controls appoints Todd Grabowski to lead Americas segment, to accelerate company's growth strategy.
data.description: An experienced executive with strong technical and commercial knowledge has been appointed to drive the growth strategy of the company. The announcement was made in Cork, Ireland on September 24, 2025. Johnson Controls (NYSE: JCI), a renowned company specializing in smart, healthy, and sustainable buildings, revealed the addition of Todd to their team.
